help_info:
I'm based on modules. Each module has commands.

Type `{0}modules` to get a list with all modules.

Type `{0}commands <moduleName>` to get a list with all commands from the module.
Example: `{0}commands Administration`, `{0}commands Server`

Type `{0}allcommands` to get a list with all commands.
Check https://rias.gg/commands to see all commands with their description and examples.
